notes: Dorothea Lange 1936. Phase 1.11: YOLO bboxes over-broad (child_right covered 5/6 of image grabbing mother). Switched to sam_bbox with hand-placed tight hints for 3 figures.

entities.name: mother
entities.label: seated woman in center with hand on chin, Florence Thompson

entities.name: child_left
entities.label: child on left side resting head on mother shoulder

entities.name: child_right
entities.label: child on right hiding face against mother shoulder
